items.caption: A comparison between real and fake products, specifically focusing on the texture and appearance of a bottle of nerium. the real product is shown on the left side, with a smooth, glossy texture and a clear label. on the right side, the fake product is depicted with a rough, uneven texture and a label that appears to be a sticker or a label that has been applied to the bottle. the text in the image warns about the risk of purchasing nerium from non-associate brand partners and suggests that the fake product may be sealed shut with glue. the image is designed to educate consumers about the differences between authentic and counterfeit products.
